pullRequest.title: [Docs] Add comment explaining DEEPEP_MAX_TOKENS_PER_RANK env variable
pullRequest.body:
## Summary
- Add an inline comment at `xtuner/v1/ray/rollout/lmdeploy.py` explaining why the `DEEPEP_MAX_TOKENS_PER_RANK` env variable is set when using lmdeploy EP mode.

## Details
`DEEPEP_MAX_TOKENS_PER_RANK` is required by DLBlas's DeepEP token dispatcher used in lmdeploy EP mode. Without this env variable, lmdeploy will fail during warmup.

References:
- [DLBlas token_dispatcher.py L81](https://github.com/DeepLink-org/DLBlas/blob/aae234451e772339f4fd075e00894205b87024fc/dlblas/layers/moe/token_dispatcher.py#L81)
- [lmdeploy utils.py L375](https://github.com/InternLM/lmdeploy/blob/81627e3dea6ce6691b078cc3e0be03e9a64122fb/lmdeploy/utils.py#L375)

Closes https://github.com/InternLM/xtuner/issues/1623
